mapper.select: /* IResidentFacilityMapper.selectResidentAptCmplexNo */ SELECT au.apt_cmplex_no FROM hshld_head hh JOIN apt_detail ad ON hh.ho_no = ad.ho_no JOIN apt_unit au ON ad.dong_no = au.dong_no WHERE hh.user_no = #{userNo} AND NVL(hh.inout_cd, 'IN') != 'OUT' AND rownum = 1

/* IResidentFacilityMapper.selectAptInfo */ SELECT ac.apt_cmplex_no aptCmplexNo , ac.apt_cmplex_nm aptCmplexNm , mo.mgmt_ofc_nm mgmtOfficeInfo , ac.sido_nm sidoNm , ac.sigungu_nm sigunguNm , ac.emd_nm emdNm , ac.dorojuso dorojuso , ac.heat_ty heatTy , ac.cnsco_nm cnscoNm , ac.unit_cnt unitCnt , ac.dong_cnt dongCnt , ac.pkg_cnt pkgCnt , ac.free_pkg_cnt freePkgCnt , ac.max_floor maxFloor , ac.cc_cnt ccCnt , ac.bld_yr bldYr FROM apt_complex ac LEFT JOIN mgmt_office mo ON ac.apt_cmplex_no = mo.apt_cmplex_no AND NVL(mo.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' WHERE ac.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo}
/* IResidentFacilityMapper.selectFacilityDongList */ SELECT DISTINCT f.dong_no dongNo FROM facility f WHERE f.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND NVL(f.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY f.dong_no

/* IResidentFacilityMapper.selectFacilityStatusCardList */ SELECT f.facility_no facilityNo , f.facility_nm facilityNm , f.facility_ty_cd facilityTyCd , ft.code_name facilityTyNm , TO_CHAR(fch.chk_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') chkDt , NVL(fch.chk_stts_cd, 'WAIT') chkSttsCd , cs.code_name chkSttsNm , NVL(fch.chk_cn, '최근 점검 이력 없음') chkCn , fch.chk_ty_cd chkTyCd , ct.code_name chkTyNm , p.partner_nm partnerNm , NVL(p.pic_nm, p.partner_nm) picNm FROM facility f LEFT JOIN common_code ft ON ft.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' AND ft.code_no_cd = f.facility_ty_cd AND ft.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT fac_chk_hstry_no , facility_no , partner_no , chk_dt , chk_stts_cd , chk_cn , chk_ty_cd , reg_dt , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY facility_no ORDER BY chk_dt DESC NULLS LAST , reg_dt DESC NULLS LAST , fac_chk_hstry_no DESC ) rn FROM facility_check_hstry ) fch ON f.facility_no = fch.facility_no AND fch.rn = 1 LEFT JOIN common_code cs ON cs.group_code_no = 'CHECK_STTS' AND cs.code_no_cd = fch.chk_stts_cd AND cs.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN common_code ct ON ct.group_code_no = 'CHECK_TY' AND ct.code_no_cd = fch.chk_ty_cd AND ct.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN partner p ON fch.partner_no = p.partner_no WHERE f.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND NVL(f.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY ft.sort_order , f.facility_nm

/* IResidentFacilityMapper.selectFacilityHistoryList */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum rn , a.* FROM ( SELECT fch.fac_chk_hstry_no facChkHstryNo , f.facility_no facilityNo , f.facility_nm facilityNm , f.facility_ty_cd facilityTyCd , ft.code_name facilityTyNm , TO_CHAR(fch.chk_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') chkDt , fch.chk_stts_cd chkSttsCd , cs.code_name chkSttsNm , fch.chk_cn chkCn , fch.chk_ty_cd chkTyCd , ct.code_name chkTyNm , p.partner_nm partnerNm , NVL(p.pic_nm, p.partner_nm) picNm FROM facility_check_hstry fch JOIN facility f ON fch.facility_no = f.facility_no LEFT JOIN common_code ft ON ft.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' AND ft.code_no_cd = f.facility_ty_cd AND ft.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN common_code cs ON cs.group_code_no = 'CHECK_STTS' AND cs.code_no_cd = fch.chk_stts_cd AND cs.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN common_code ct ON ct.group_code_no = 'CHECK_TY' AND ct.code_no_cd = fch.chk_ty_cd AND ct.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN partner p ON fch.partner_no = p.partner_no WHERE f.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND NVL(f.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y'
AND ( f.facility_ty_cd LIKE '%' || #{facilityTyCd} || '%' OR ft.code_name LIKE '%' || #{facilityTyCd} || '%' )
AND TRUNC(fch.chk_dt) >= TO_DATE(#{historyChkStartDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(fch.chk_dt) <= TO_DATE(#{historyChkEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND f.facility_nm LIKE '%' || #{historyFacilityNm} || '%'
AND fch.chk_cn LIKE '%' || #{historyChkCn} || '%'
AND ( fch.chk_stts_cd LIKE '%' || #{historyChkStts} || '%' OR cs.code_name LIKE '%' || #{historyChkStts} || '%' OR CASE fch.chk_stts_cd WHEN 'WAIT' THEN '점검대기' WHEN 'ING' THEN '점검중' WHEN 'DONE' THEN '점검완료' WHEN 'FAULT' THEN '이상발견' ELSE '점검대기' END LIKE '%' || #{historyChkStts} || '%' )
AND NVL(p.pic_nm, p.partner_nm) LIKE '%' || #{historyPicNm} || '%'
ORDER BY
fch.chk_dt f.facility_nm fch.chk_cn cs.code_name NVL(p.pic_nm, p.partner_nm) fch.chk_dt
${sortOrder} NULLS LAST , fch.reg_dt DESC NULLS LAST , fch.fac_chk_hstry_no DESC ) a WHERE rownum <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn >= #{startRow}

/* IResidentFacilityMapper.selectFacilityHistoryCount */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM facility_check_hstry fch JOIN facility f ON fch.facility_no = f.facility_no LEFT JOIN common_code ft ON ft.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' AND ft.code_no_cd = f.facility_ty_cd AND ft.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN common_code cs ON cs.group_code_no = 'CHECK_STTS' AND cs.code_no_cd = fch.chk_stts_cd AND cs.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN partner p ON fch.partner_no = p.partner_no WHERE f.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND NVL(f.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y'
AND ( f.facility_ty_cd LIKE '%' || #{facilityTyCd} || '%' OR ft.code_name LIKE '%' || #{facilityTyCd} || '%' )
AND TRUNC(fch.chk_dt) >= TO_DATE(#{historyChkStartDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(fch.chk_dt) <= TO_DATE(#{historyChkEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND f.facility_nm LIKE '%' || #{historyFacilityNm} || '%'
AND fch.chk_cn LIKE '%' || #{historyChkCn} || '%'
AND ( fch.chk_stts_cd LIKE '%' || #{historyChkStts} || '%' OR cs.code_name LIKE '%' || #{historyChkStts} || '%' OR CASE fch.chk_stts_cd WHEN 'WAIT' THEN '점검대기' WHEN 'ING' THEN '점검중' WHEN 'DONE' THEN '점검완료' WHEN 'FAULT' THEN '이상발견' ELSE '점검대기' END LIKE '%' || #{historyChkStts} || '%' )
AND NVL(p.pic_nm, p.partner_nm) LIKE '%' || #{historyPicNm} || '%'

/* * 예약 가능한 편의시설 조회 * CMN_FACILITY_RSV_YN = 'Y' 인 데이터만 카드로 보여줍니다. */ SELECT pf.cmn_facility_no cmnFacilityNo , pf.cmn_facility_nm cmnFacilityNm , pf.cmn_facility_cn cmnFacilityCn , pf.cmn_facility_amt cmnFacilityAmt , pf.cmn_facility_rsv_yn cmnFacilityRsvYn , pf.cmn_facility_opr_hr cmnFacilityOprHr , f.facility_no facilityNo , f.facility_nm facilityNm , f.dong_no dongNo , f.loc_cn locCn FROM public_facility pf LEFT JOIN facility f ON pf.facility_no = f.facility_no WHERE pf.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND pf.cmn_facility_rsv_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY pf.cmn_facility_nm
